password.title: Password
password.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.subtitle: Permanently remove your account and data from Tascom.
deleteAccount.warningBody: Once you delete your account, all of your data will be permanently lost. Please be certain.
deleteAccount.point1: Your public profile will be immediately deactivated.
deleteAccount.point2: All your earned points will be lost.
deleteAccount.point3: Your active tasks will be canceled automatically.
deleteAccount.point4: You will not receive any further notifications related to your account.
deleteAccount.modalBody: Are you sure you want to delete this account? This action cannot be undone.

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.inboxDesc: You'll receive all your notifications directly inside the platform inbox.
notifications.emailDesc: Get an email summary for unread notifications, grouped and sent based on priority.

items.taskMatchesSkills: Task matches your skills or interests
items.mentionedInTask: You were mentioned in a task
